title: World Football
description: 15 questions about World Cup history, legendary players, famous goals, and club records

questions.question: Which country has won the most FIFA World Cup titles?
questions.explanation: Brazil has won the FIFA World Cup a record 5 times (1958, 1962, 1970, 1994, 2002).

questions.question: Who holds the record for the most goals scored in a single World Cup tournament?
questions.explanation: Just Fontaine of France scored 13 goals in the 1958 World Cup, a record that still stands.

questions.question: In which year was the first FIFA World Cup held?
questions.explanation: The first FIFA World Cup was held in Uruguay in 1930, with Uruguay winning the tournament.

questions.question: Which player has scored the most goals in World Cup history (all tournaments combined)?
questions.explanation: Miroslav Klose of Germany scored 16 goals across four World Cups (2002-2014).

questions.question: What is known as the 'Hand of God' goal?
options: Maradona's handball goal against England in 1986
questions.explanation: Diego Maradona punched the ball into the net against England in the 1986 World Cup quarterfinal, later calling it 'the Hand of God.'

questions.question: Which club has won the most UEFA Champions League / European Cup titles?
questions.explanation: Real Madrid has won the Champions League/European Cup a record 15 times.

questions.question: Who is the all-time top scorer in UEFA Champions League history?
questions.explanation: Cristiano Ronaldo holds the record with 140 Champions League goals.

questions.question: Which country won the 2022 FIFA World Cup in Qatar?
questions.explanation: Argentina won the 2022 World Cup, defeating France in a dramatic penalty shootout in the final.

questions.question: What was the 'Miracle of Bern'?
options: West Germany's 1954 World Cup victory over Hungary
questions.explanation: West Germany's unexpected 3-2 victory over heavily favored Hungary in the 1954 World Cup final is known as the Miracle of Bern.

questions.question: Which player has won the most Ballon d'Or awards?
questions.explanation: Lionel Messi has won the Ballon d'Or a record 8 times.

questions.question: What was the final score of Brazil's infamous 2014 World Cup semifinal loss to Germany?
questions.explanation: Germany demolished host nation Brazil 7-1 in the 2014 World Cup semifinal, one of the most shocking results in football history.

questions.question: Which English club became the first to win the treble (League, FA Cup, Champions League) in 1999?
questions.explanation: Manchester United won the Premier League, FA Cup, and Champions League in the 1998-99 season under Sir Alex Ferguson.

questions.question: Who scored a hat-trick in the 2022 World Cup final?
questions.explanation: Kylian Mbappe scored a hat-trick in the 2022 World Cup final against Argentina, though France ultimately lost on penalties.

questions.question: Which country hosted the World Cup in both 1986 and 1970?
questions.explanation: Mexico hosted the World Cup in both 1970 and 1986, becoming the first country to host the tournament twice.

questions.question: What is the record for the most Premier League titles won by a single club?
questions.explanation: Manchester United have won the Premier League 13 times (since its rebranding in 1992), all under Sir Alex Ferguson.
